game_meta.name: Fortnite
game_meta.tagline: Battle Royale + building mode — 100 players, Zero Build or Build mode, ring closing, loot economy.

sides.attack: Rotating IN to POIs, contesting other squads
sides.defense: Holding loot / endgame zone, third-party setups

game_meta.round_format: BR — 100 players, 1 winner. Ring closes over ~25 minutes.
key_mechanics: Two modes: Zero Build (no building) and Build (full build mechanics)
Loot rarities: common (gray) → uncommon (green) → rare (blue) → epic (purple) → legendary (gold) → mythic (orange)
Healing: bandages (15 HP), medkit (full HP, 10s), small shield (25 shield), big shield (50 shield, 5s), slurp juice (75 over time)
Movement: sprint, slide, mantle, swim, jump, vehicles (cars, planes)
Mobility items: Launch Pad, Crash Pad, Shockwave Grenade, Shockwave Hammer (varies by chapter)
Build mechanics (Build mode): walls, floors, ramps, cones — 100 mats per builder
Storm: closes over 25 minutes, damage scales from 1 to 25 HP/tick
POI: Point of Interest — named map location with tier-1/2/3 loot
Mythic POI: Special POI with mythic-tier loot (boss + key)
match_types: Zero Build (ZB) Solo / Duo / Squad: No building, pure shooter BR
Build (BR) Solo / Duo / Squad: Full building mechanics
Reload: Smaller-map BR with respawn timers (Resurgence-style)
Creative Ranked: Custom 1v1 / Zone Wars / Box Fight / Tycoon
OG: Original Chapter 1 map (Pleasant Park, Tilted Towers, etc.)

sites.name: Pleasant Piazza
sites.strategy: Hot drop, tier-3 loot. Push center on contest.

sites.name: Foxy Floodgate
sites.strategy: Dam center exposed. Bridge for cover.

sites.name: Shogun's X-tate
sites.strategy: Castle vertical POI, mythic boss spawn.

sites.name: Open-Air Onsen
sites.strategy: Vertical play with hot springs cover.

sites.name: Tilted Towers
sites.strategy: Iconic hot drop — high-tier loot, always contested. Push center on contest.

sites.name: The Citadel
sites.strategy: Castle POI with tower verticality. Mythic boss spawn.

sites.name: Mythic POI
sites.strategy: Mythic loot — contest after boss kill on low HP.

sites.name: Coastal
sites.strategy: Beach-side POI with water rotation route.

sites.name: Lavish Lair
sites.strategy: Mansion POI with tier-3 vault. Reload respawn play.

sites.name: Pleasant Park
sites.strategy: OG 7-house suburban POI. Tall House controls map.

sites.name: Retail Row
sites.strategy: OG strip mall POI with tier-2 shop loot.

sites.name: Greasy Grove
sites.strategy: OG strip mall + Durr Burger POI.

sites.name: Zone Wars
sites.strategy: Ranked endgame simulator. Take high ground first.

Aggressor / Entry.description: Player pushing into POIs, taking close-range duels with SMG/shotgun.
Aggressor / Entry.loadout: SMG / Shotgun + AR + Heals + Mobility item
common_mistakes: No mobility item ready for escape
No build response (Build mode) — no walls on engagement
Aggressor / Entry.ideal_use: Close-range duels, fast pushes with Crash Pad / Shockwave, build wall + edit for shot if Build mode.

Marksman / Long-range.description: Player using Sniper / DMR for long sightlines and squad coverage.
common_mistakes: Holding same angle past first kill
No off-angle for the long shot
Marksman / Long-range.ideal_use: Long-range pick from high ground, reposition after first kill, cover team rotation.

Rotator / Mobility.description: Player using mobility items (Launch Pad, Crash Pad, Shockwave) for squad rotation.
common_mistakes: Mobility item wasted on solo flank
Rotator / Mobility.ideal_use: Squad rotation lead, Crash Pad for fast moves, Launch Pad for endgame zone access.

Support / Heal.description: Player running heals, wall items, and squad support.
Support / Heal.loadout: AR + Heals + Wall item (Build) + Big Shields
Support / Heal.ideal_use: Heal cycle post-fight, wall up for squad cover, Big Shield before rotations.

gold: Ult save vs use decision wrong
No team commit on Hardpoint / POI
platinum: Buy / loot decision based on round count
diamond_elite: Pro-tier reads on enemy comp — predictable on own
Util discipline gaps — 1 wasted Mobility per round
Off-angle pre-aim not adjusted per round

positioning: Is the player in trade position with squad?
Is the player exposed to multiple sightlines?
Is the team using cover (rock, tree, building, walls in Build mode)?
Is the team on correct side of ring?
Did the player commit to rotation or stay contested?
Is the player on high ground or low?
Did the player react to enemy build response (Build mode)?
crosshair: Is the crosshair pre-aimed at head level?
Is the player tracking on hitscan or projectile leading?
Is the player using the right weapon class for range?
Is the player ADS or hipfire close range?
Is the player aim-assist abusing in close range (controller)?
utility: Did the player use Mobility item proactively?
Did the player save mobility for endgame zone access?
Was the team coordinated on heals + rotation?
Did the player use shield/heal before rotations?
Was the team coordinated on Launch Pad / Crash Pad?
Did the player track enemy storm rotation timing?
decisions: Did the player drop the right POI?
Did the team commit to fight or rotate?
Did the player engage 1v2+ without team backup?
Did the player commit to team push or solo flank?
Did the player track ring damage and rotate?
Did the player choose to third-party or hold?
In Build mode: did the player edit walls for shot/cover?
In Zero Build: did the player use natural cover (tree, rock, building)?

vocabulary: POI: Point of Interest — named map location with loot.
Mythic POI: Special POI with mythic-tier loot + boss + key.
Hot drop: POI where 3+ squads land at start.
Edge drop: POI on map edge, less contested.
Tier loot: Common/Uncommon/Rare/Epic/Legendary/Mythic rarity tiers.
Mythic: Highest tier loot (orange), 1-2 per match.
Legendary: Gold tier loot.
Boss: Mythic POI boss enemy that drops mythic loot.
Key: Mythic POI key to access vault.
Vault: Locked loot container behind Key.
Storm: Closing ring, damages players outside.
Storm damage: HP loss per tick when outside ring.
Endgame: Final ring with 2-3 squads remaining.
Ring: Storm closing area.
Rotation / Rotate: Moving from current position to next zone.
Hot rotate: Fast rotation through enemy POIs.
Edge rotate: Rotation along ring edge for safety.
Squad wipe: Killing all 4 squad members.
Third-party: Squad pushing into existing fight.
Anti-third-party: Pre-positioning for third squad arrival.
Heals: Bandages, Medkit, Slurp Juice — HP restore.
Shields: Small Shield (Mini), Big Shield (Pot), Slurp Juice — shield restore.
Mini Shield: 25 shield, fast use.
Big Shield (Pot): 50 shield, 5s use.
Slurp Juice: 75 HP/shield over time, fast use.
Medkit: Full HP, 10s use.
Bandage: 15 HP, fast use.
Launch Pad: Vertical mobility, places on floor.
Crash Pad: Bouncy pad for movement.
Shockwave Grenade: Knockback grenade for fast moves.
Shockwave Hammer: Melee shockwave weapon.
Mobility item: Launch Pad, Crash Pad, Shockwave, etc.
Build mode: Full building mechanics enabled.
Zero Build: No building, pure shooter BR.
Wall: Build piece — vertical cover.
Floor: Build piece — horizontal platform.
Ramp: Build piece — slope for elevation.
Cone: Build piece — covers vertical space.
Edit: Modify a build piece (cut window, doorway, etc.).
Box fight: 1v1/2v2 building duel.
Zone Wars: Endgame simulator with closing zones.
Tycoon: Resource gathering + raid mode.
Pit: FFA arena.
Reload: Smaller-map BR with respawn timers (Resurgence-style).
OG: Original Chapter 1 map.
Mats / Materials: Wood / brick / metal for building.
Tilted: Tilted Towers, iconic hot drop POI.
Citadel: The Citadel, castle POI.
Skywalk: Tilted Towers connector skyway.
Aim assist: Controller / console auto-aim help.
